data/maps/MauvilleCity_Gym/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_GymGuideAdvice:
Hey, how's it going, the CHAMPION-
bound {PLAYER}?\pWATTSON, the LEADER of MAUVILLE
GYM, uses ELECTRIC-type POKéMON.\pIf you challenge him with WATER-type
POKéMON, he'll zap them! Bzzt!\pAnd, he's put in switch-controlled doors
all over his GYM! Eccentric!\pHey, go for it!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_Gym/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_GymGuidePostVictor: Whoa, you're electrifying!\nYou've powered the door open!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_Gym/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_KirkIntro: My electric soul, it'll shatter your\ndreams whole, whoah-yeahah!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_Gym/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_KirkDefeat: That was plugged in, amped up,\nover-driven electric, man!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_Gym/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_KirkPostBattle: POKéMON and rock, it's all about heart,\nwhoah yeah!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_Gym/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_ShawnIntro: I trained under WATTSON!\nThere ain't no way I'd lose easily!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_Gym/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_ShawnPostBattle: WATTSON, our GYM LEADER, has been\naround for a long, long time.\pHe was battling even before your\ndaddy was born, that tough coot.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_Gym/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_BenIntro: This GYM's got puzzles!\nIsn't it fun?
data/maps/MauvilleCity_Gym/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_BenPostBattle: WATTSON says he likes setting up\nlittle traps with switches.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_Gym/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_VivianIntro: With my charm and my POKéMON's moves,\nyou'll be shocked!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_Gym/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_VivianPostBattle: I've heard that MAUVILLE was founded\nby WATTSON.\pHe was a TRAINER long before we\nbecame TRAINERS.\lHe must know all sorts of things!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_Gym/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_WattsonIntro:
I've given up on my plans to convert
the city, I have.\pAnd so, I put my time into making
door traps in my GYM.\pOh? Now, what are you doing here?\pWhat's that? You say you've gotten
past all my rigged doors?\pWahahahah!
Now, that is amusing!\pThen, I, WATTSON, the LEADER of
MAUVILLE GYM, shall electrify you!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_Gym/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_WattsonDefeat: Wahahahah!\nFine, I lost!\pYou ended up giving me a thrill!\nTake this BADGE!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_Gym/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_ExplainDynamoBadge:
With the DYNAMO BADGE, POKéMON can
use ROCK SMASH out of battle.\pAnd, it will make your POKéMON a little
bit faster, too.\pHmm...
You should take this, too!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_Gym/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_ExplainShockWave: That TM34 there contains SHOCK WAVE.\pIt's a trustworthy move that never\nmisses! You can count on it!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_Gym/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_WattsonPostBattle: I swell with optimism, seeing a promising\nyoung TRAINER like you!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_Gym/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_GymStatueCertified: MAUVILLE CITY POKéMON GYM\pWATTSON'S CERTIFIED TRAINERS:\n{PLAYER}
